headline: Snowflake Aims To Become AI Control Plane With New Enterprise Features
summary: Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) has expanded Snowflake Intelligence and Cortex Code with new features aimed at supporting an agentic enterprise model. The updates focus on allowing both technical and non technical users to automate workflows and personalize experiences using AI. Snowflake now connects more directly with tools such as Salesforce, Google Workspace, and Slack, extending its reach across enterprise systems. For investors following NYSE:SNOW, this development sits at the intersection of...

headline: ‘You feel radicalized’: A Meta AI exec watched agents beat her top workers. Now she’s built a nonprofit to help Gen Z find jobs before they disappear
summary: Gen Z is facing AI-driven layoffs and fewer entry-level jobs. Former Meta and Salesforce AI head Clara Shih says young workers can future-proof their careers by learning how to use AI agents.
